# NY English Teacher — Full Site Guide

> Professional Business English coaching for executives, tech professionals, and startup founders in Mexico and Latin America.

## About the Practice

NY English Teacher is a professional English coaching practice founded by Robert Cushman, a New York-based English coach with 20+ years of experience. We specialize in helping Mexican and Latin American professionals master the business English skills that drive career advancement.

This is not ESL or conversational English. We train professionals to perform under pressure — leading meetings, negotiating deals, presenting to boards, and communicating with authority in North American business environments.

**Founder:** Robert Cushman
**Location:** New York, NY (coaching delivered remotely via Google Meet)
**Target Market:** Mexico City, Guadalajara, Monterrey, and across Latin America
**Languages:** English coaching with full Spanish support

## Core Services

### Business & Executive English
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/executive-english/
For C-suite executives and senior leaders who need to communicate with authority in English. Covers board presentations, stakeholder management, cross-cultural negotiation, and executive presence.

### English for Startup Founders
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/startup-founders/
Pitch decks, investor meetings, board communication, and the specific English needed to raise capital and scale internationally.

### English for Tech
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/tech-english/
Sprint ceremonies, code reviews, client demos, async Slack communication, incident response, and technical presentations for software developers and engineering managers.

### English for Logistics
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/logistics-english/
Supply chain communication, vendor negotiations, compliance documentation, and cross-border coordination.

### English for Doctors, Lawyers & Professionals
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/professional-english/
Industry-specific vocabulary, patient/client communication, and professional credibility for licensed practitioners.

### Interview & Presentation Coaching
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/services/high-stakes-english/
High-stakes preparation for job interviews, keynote presentations, media appearances, and career-defining moments.

## Interactive Tools

### Speaking Confidence Quiz
URL: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/quiz/speaking-confidence/
A 2-minute self-assessment that identifies specific communication gaps costing professionals credibility with North American clients. Provides personalized recommendations.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does coaching cost?**
$30 USD per session, or $360 USD for a 12-session package. Corporate packages available.

**What level do I need to start?**
Intermediate to advanced. We don't teach basic English — we refine professionals who already communicate but want to command.

**How are sessions delivered?**
60-minute Google Meet sessions, scheduled flexibly around your work calendar.

**How quickly will I see results?**
Most clients report measurable improvement in 3-5 sessions. We focus on high-impact changes first.

**Do you work with companies?**
Yes. Corporate training packages are available for teams, departments, and C-suites.

**What industries do you specialize in?**
Technology, finance, logistics, medical, legal, and startups — any sector where English proficiency directly impacts revenue and career growth.

**Why coaching instead of a language school?**
Language schools teach English. We train performance. The difference is like a gym membership vs. a personal trainer for athletes.

**Can you issue corporate invoices?**
Yes, we can issue invoices for Mexican companies (factura) and international companies.

## Methodology

Our approach is **performance coaching**, not language instruction:
1. **Diagnose**: Identify the specific communication gaps holding you back
2. **Prioritize**: Focus on the highest-impact skills for your role and industry
3. **Train**: Practice real scenarios from your work — not textbook exercises
4. **Measure**: Track improvement against concrete professional outcomes

## Pricing

- Individual sessions: $30 USD
- 12-session package: $360 USD ($30/session)
- Price range: 500-6,000 MXN depending on package
- Corporate packages: Custom pricing
- Free initial consultation available

## Bilingual Support

The entire site is available in both English and Spanish:
- English: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/en/
- Spanish: https://www.nyenglishteacher.com/es/

All blog posts, resources, services, and pages have Spanish equivalents optimized for Mexican Spanish (es-MX).
